materials.name: AAC Blocks
materials.notes: Lightweight, excellent thermal insulation, easy to cut and shape. Ideal for non-load-bearing partition walls.

materials.name: Red Brick
materials.notes: Traditional masonry material with excellent compressive strength. Best for load-bearing walls and structural applications.

materials.name: RCC (Reinforced Cement Concrete)
materials.notes: Maximum structural strength for columns, beams, and slabs. Essential for multi-storey buildings and load-bearing structures.

materials.name: Steel Frame
materials.notes: Best strength-to-weight ratio. Ideal for large span structures, industrial buildings, and high-rise construction. Requires corrosion protection.

materials.name: Hollow Concrete Block
materials.notes: Cost-effective for non-structural and partition walls. Good sound insulation and faster construction.

materials.name: Fly Ash Brick
materials.notes: Eco-friendly, uniform shape, low water absorption. Excellent for general walling applications with good thermal properties.

materials.name: Precast Concrete Panel
materials.notes: Factory-manufactured quality control. Fast installation for large projects. Ideal for structural walls and floor slabs.
